agentSpans.name: invoke_agent Strands Agents
agentSpans.input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use the get_time tool exactly once to get the current time in London.
agentSpans.output:
<thinking>I have received the result for the current time in London from the get_time tool. I will now provide the information to the User.</thinking>

The current time in London is 7:00 AM GMT.
